requirements.task_name: Get an online quote and select the cheapest plan with $300,000 liability and $500 deductible
requirements.task_description: Start a new boat insurance quote for a 22-foot sailboat in ZIP 98109, set liability to $300,000 and deductible to $500, then choose the cheapest available plan and select annual payment.
existing_variables: // quote.boatId, boatLengthFeet, boatValue, primaryZip, usage, liabilityLimit, deductible, selectedPlanId, billingFrequency

requirements.task_name: Customize optional coverages while keeping added cost under $20 per month
requirements.task_description: Create a quote, then add towing and personal effects coverages so that towing is included and personal effects is at least $1,000, while ensuring the displayed additional monthly cost of optional coverages stays under $20.
existing_variables: // per-quote entries: {quoteId, optionalCoverageId, selected, selectedLimit, additionalCostMonthly}

requirements.task_name: Log in and update the mailing address for an existing boat policy
requirements.task_description: Use the customer portal to log in with provided demo credentials, open an existing boat policy, change the mailing address to a specific Seattle address, and then view the digital ID card for that policy.
existing_variables: // to confirm the policy is a boat policy if needed
// ID card documents associated to the policy

required_variables.set_condition: After resolving a non-null currentCard for the requested policyId (i.e., when an ID card is successfully found and returned).
required_variables.value_to_set: JSON.stringify({ policyId: policyId, documentId: currentCard.id, viewedAt: new Date().toISOString() })
required_variables.reason: Provides evidence that the user actually opened/viewed a digital ID card, and for which policy, enabling the evaluator to confirm that the ID card viewed corresponds to the updated boat policy (policyNumber 'BP-10001'). This does not alter existing business behavior.

requirements.task_name: File an online claim for $3,200 hull damage with no injuries
requirements.task_description: Submit an online boat insurance claim for policy BP-10001 for hull damage from a collision with a dock at Lake Union on 08/15/2025, with an estimated damage amount of $3,200 and no injuries reported.
existing_variables: // full claim records: incidentDate, incidentLocation, causeOfDamage, estimatedDamageAmount, injuriesStatus, policeReportStatus, owner info, incidentDescription, status
// to resolve policyNumber 'BP-10001' to policyId used by the claim
// optional: confirm the claim is for a boat policy

requirements.task_name: Find a local agent within 15 miles of ZIP 98109 and send a consultation request
requirements.task_description: Search for local agents near ZIP 98109, filter to a 15-mile radius, open the closest agent’s page, and submit a consultation request message about boat insurance for a 22-foot sailboat.
existing_variables: // request.agentId, fromName, fromEmail, fromPhone, message, createdAt

requirements.task_name: Compare policy types and start a quote for the lowest-priced plan with towing and uninsured boater coverage and $500,000 liability
requirements.task_description: Use the coverage comparison tool to identify the lowest-priced policy type that includes both on-water towing and uninsured boater coverage, then start a quote for that policy type and set liability to at least $500,000.
existing_variables: // used for feature codes in comparison, if needed by evaluator
// mapping of coverageFeatures to policy types (optional for deeper checks)
// quote.policyTypeId, liabilityLimit, step progression via beginApplicantInfoForCurrentQuote
// to confirm ZIP 98109 and boatValue 35000 if the evaluator checks those

requirements.task_name: Apply boating safety and multi-policy discounts to a quote and save it with a label
requirements.task_description: Locate the discounts section, identify the Boating Safety Course and Multi-Policy discounts, start a quote from that page, apply both discounts to the quote, select monthly payments, and save the quote with a specific label.
existing_variables: // quote.appliedDiscountIds, discountsApplied, billingFrequency, label, status, referenceNumber

requirements.task_name: Use the FAQ to find the maximum boat length allowed for online quotes and start a qualifying quote
requirements.task_description: Search the Help/FAQ section to discover the maximum boat length that can be quoted online, then start a new quote and enter a boat length exactly 1 foot less than that maximum value before proceeding to coverage options.
existing_variables: // includes maxOnlineQuoteBoatLengthFeet and slugs like 'boat_eligibility_for_online_quotes' or 'faq_maximum_boat_length'
// quote.boatLengthFeet, boatValue, primaryZip, usage, and indirect evidence of progression (no eligibility errors and continued usage)
